findings.message: The inline DOB schema in checkInRowSchema.ts is only z.string().optional() fields, not strict. Replacing with canonical dateOfBirthSchema would tighten validation and violate the non-goal of no validation logic changes.
activitiesData.ts Activity interface / activitySchema.ts Zod schema pair remains unaddressed — hand-written interface should become z.infer<typeof activitySchema>.
PayType recommended for schemas/cityTaxSchema.ts which contradicts the stated pattern that schema files are for Zod schemas + z.infer<> exports. Domain file is the correct canonical location.
DateOfBirth duplication count overstated — relay files and alias layers are not independent source definitions.
